Job description

Company Overview

World Salon is a rapidly growing startup operating at the intersection of technology, professional development, and media. Originally founded as a student organization at Columbia University, we now connect professionals across the finance, technology, and ESG sectors, fostering collaboration through curated seminars, digital events, and AI-driven content. Our mission is to ignite bold conversations, empower thought leaders, and inspire innovation through dynamic and inclusive platforms.

We are seeking a Backend Developer Intern who is eager to help build, maintain, and scale our platform’s backend systems while supporting our mission.

What We Offer

Impactful Work – Contribute to a fast-growing platform that connects global professionals.
Innovative Environment – Work with cutting-edge tools in Node.js, Express, AWS, and database management.
Mentorship & Growth – Gain hands-on experience and guidance from senior engineers.
Remote Flexibility – Work from anywhere while collaborating with a global team.

Role Overview

As a Backend Developer Intern you will be working with experienced software engineers contributing to the backend systems of our platform. This role focuses primarily on Python-based backend development using FastAPI, with opportunities to work on APIs, cloud infrastructure, data pipelines, and web scraping tools.

Key Responsibilities:

🔹 Backend API Development

Design, build, and optimize RESTful APIs using Python and FastAPI.
Ensure scalability and security of backend services.

🔹Data, Web Scraping & Automation

Build and maintain web scraping pipelines to collect and process structured and unstructured data
Support AI-driven data workflows, including tools such as ScrapeGraph AI, LangGraph
Help structure scraped data for downstream use in APIs or analytics systems

🔹 System Architecture & Design

Architect efficient, scalable backend solutions to support growing user demand.
Optimize database interactions using SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL) 
Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms (JWT, OAuth).

🔹 Cloud & Infrastructure Management

Deploy, monitor, and optimize applications on AWS (ECS, EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, SQS).
Utilize AWS services to enhance backend performance and reliability.
Work with Docker Compose and Terraform for containerized applications and infrastructure management.

🔹 Performance & Security

Implement caching solutions (Redis, Memcached) to improve response times.
Identify and resolve backend bottlenecks to ensure smooth performance.
Enhance platform security against vulnerabilities and attacks.

🔹 Collaboration & Documentation

Work closely with frontend developers, designers, and data engineers to integrate systems.
Document backend services, APIs, and workflows for future scalability.

 

What We're Looking For

Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related fields.
Proficiency in Python 
Experience or familiarity with FastAPI
Understanding of databases – SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL) 
Familiarity with Docker Compose, Terraform, and containerized application deployment.
Familiarity with LangGraph for building or managing AI workflows
Experience  in web scraping (ScrapeGraph AI)
Strong problem-solving and debugging skills.
Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.

Nice to have:

Familiarity with AWS (ECS, EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, IAM configurations).
Interest in AI-powered platforms and data-driven product

Credit Process

Students are responsible for consulting their academic department to ensure the internship meets program requirements (e.g., hours completed, deliverables, and learning outcomes). World Salon will collaborate with students to complete necessary forms and provide supporting documentation.

Our leadership programs are designed to unlock your full potential and help you develop the skills you need to become a successful leader. Our community is made up of like-minded individuals who are passionate about making a positive impact in the world. Join us today in driving the urgent change we yearn to see, one conversation at a time.
